name: P250 | 多面体
descriptionEn: A low-recoil firearm with a high rate of fire, the P250 is a relatively inexpensive choice against armored opponents. This memento from Agency has been painted with a polygonal patterned hydrographic. My men are professionals, they'll get the job done right... - Elliott Kingsman, Career Criminal
descriptionZh: 一把低后坐力和高射速的手枪，在对付穿了护甲的对手时，P250 是一个相对便宜的选择。 这把来自办公大楼的纪念武器使用多边形图案的花纹进行了涂装。 我的手下各个身经百战，他们会很好地完成任务… - 职业罪犯埃利奥特.金士曼
